title: post api upload file upload success
description: Test uploading a file using POST /api/upload with multipart/form-data including guest_session_id. Verify response status 201 and response body shape { file: { id, telegram_file_id, size_bytes } }.

title: post api upload duplicate filename conflict
description: Test uploading a file with the same filename as an existing file using POST /api/upload for the same guest_session_id. Verify the second request is rejected (409 preferred; 500 acceptable if duplicate handling is server-error backed) and does not create a second successful file record.

title: post chunked upload init with authorization success
description: Test initializing a chunked upload session via frontend proxy POST /api/upload/init with JSON body { fileName, fileSize, mimeType, totalChunks, guestSessionId }. Verify status 200 and response includes uploadId and chunkEndpoint.

title: post chunked upload init without authorization unauthorized
description: Test chunked init validation using POST /api/upload/init with missing required fields (fileName, fileSize, totalChunks). Verify status 400 and validation error message.

title: post chunked upload complete with authorization success
description: MUST use only frontend proxy endpoints on localhost:3000: POST /api/upload/init, POST /api/upload/chunk, POST /api/upload/complete. MUST NOT call /chunked-upload/* on port 3000. Use payload fields uploadId and chunkIndex for /api/upload/chunk, and uploadId,fileName,fileSize,mimeType,(userId or guestSessionId) for /api/upload/complete. Verify /api/upload/complete returns 201 and { file: { id, telegram_file_id, size_bytes } }.

title: post api upload tdlib service unavailable
description: Test upload validation branch by sending POST /api/upload without file. Verify status 400 and clear validation error.

title: get file public stream with valid token
description: Upload step MUST expect 201 and parse response shape { file: ... }. Then test GET /file/[...params] using token built as base64url(UUID bytes) and filename. Verify response is redirect (30x) with Location header to signed URL.

title: get file public stream with range header partial content
description: Upload step MUST include guest_session_id and expect 201 with { file: ... }. Build token as base64url(UUID bytes). Request GET /file/{token}/{filename} with Range: bytes=0-1023 and verify 206 plus Content-Range header.

title: get api files list with authorization success
description: Upload setup MUST include guest_session_id and expect 201 with { file: ... }. Then call GET /api/files with guest_session_id query (no bearer token required for this guest path). Verify status 200 and response shape { files: [...] }.

title: patch api files update metadata success
description: Test updating file metadata such as renaming using PATCH /api/files with body containing id and new name. Verify status 200 and response shape { file: { id, name } } (wrapped under file key, not top-level id/name).
